app_release_notes: v1.0.5 - Quality-of-life update: press and hold the minus/plus buttons to spin ladder numbers fast, Past Loads and Rework a Saved Load now find every load you've saved, and the built-in User Guide and Help are refreshed for the new Measure workflow.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.0.5 - Quality-of-life update: press and hold the minus/plus buttons to spin ladder numbers fast, Past Loads and Rework a Saved Load now find every load you've saved, and the built-in User Guide and Help are refreshed for the new Measure workflow.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.0.4 - The big Measure-a-Ladder update (several groups per target photo, ruler-style Set scale, seating jam support, one active load with Past Loads, auto-named loads), now with a polish pass so input fields no longer cut off long values (rifle/optic names, ladder charges) and hints read cleaner.
